name: Book a Restaurant Reservation
description: Call a restaurant to book a table at a specific date / time / party size, handle full-availability gracefully, and politely angle for a better table or time when possible.

context.when_to_use: User wants a table at a specific restaurant for a specific date and time. The restaurant either doesn't take online reservations, the desired slot isn't showing online, or the user wants a specific seating area (window, patio, booth) that the online system doesn't let them request.
preconditions: User has the date, time, and party size locked in (or a small acceptable window for each).
User has the restaurant's phone number.
User has their name + a callback number to leave for the reservation.
If applicable: any dietary restrictions, allergies, or accessibility needs.

principles: Be brief and warm — a host fielding 50 calls a night appreciates someone who gets to the point.
Lead with the specific ask, not small talk. 'I'd like to book a table for two on Friday at 7:30' before any pleasantry.
If the first slot is full, have a fallback ready BEFORE they ask. Don't make the host scroll through options for you.
Special requests (window seat, anniversary cake) go AT THE END after the booking is confirmed, not as a condition of the booking.
Always thank the host by name before hanging up.

phrases.opener: Hi, I'd like to book a table for [party_size] on [day] at [time] — is that available?
phrases.fallback_offer: If [time] doesn't work, I'm flexible — anywhere from [earlier_time] to [later_time] would also work.
phrases.request_specific_seating: If you have a [seating preference, e.g. booth, patio, window] available, that would be lovely — but only if it works with what you've got.
phrases.occasion_note: We're celebrating [occasion] — no need to do anything special, just thought you should know.
phrases.callback_left: My name is [name] and the best number is [phone]. Should I confirm anything else?
phrases.graceful_close_success: Thank you so much, [host_name] — we'll see you [day] at [time].
phrases.graceful_close_full: No worries at all, thanks for checking. I'll try [alternate_date] online. Have a great evening!

tactics.name: Open with the full ask
tactics.script: Use `opener`. Include party size, day, and time in the first sentence — saves the host from extracting them piece by piece.

tactics.name: Offer flexibility immediately if asked
tactics.when: Host says the requested time isn't available.
tactics.script: Use `fallback_offer` with the user's pre-stated acceptable window. Don't make the host ask 'what about earlier?' three times.

tactics.name: Add the occasion AFTER confirmation
tactics.when: Reservation is confirmed; host is wrapping up.
tactics.script: Mention the occasion with `occasion_note`. Hosts often quietly arrange something small (a sparkler, a window table) when they have a beat of time. Asking before confirmation makes it feel transactional.

tactics.name: Get the host's name
tactics.script: Casual: 'Sorry, I didn't catch your name?' Then thank them by name on close. Restaurants notice.

boundaries: Do NOT promise a tip or anything monetary in exchange for a better table.
Do NOT lie about the occasion (e.g. claiming it's a birthday when it isn't) to get free dessert.
Do NOT haggle on minimums or fees — that's for the host's manager, not the host.
Do NOT keep the host on the phone with small talk if they sound rushed.
success_signals: Host confirms the date / time / party size.
Host volunteers seating ('I have a nice booth open').
failure_signals: Restaurant is closed on the requested day.
Restaurant is fully booked for every slot in the user's window.

exit_strategy.on_success: Read back the date, time, party size, and the name the reservation is under. Thank the host by name.
exit_strategy.on_failure: Thank the host warmly, mention you'll try the online system or another date, and end the call. Report back so the user can pick an alternative.
follow_ups: Calendar the reservation in the user's calendar with the restaurant name + party size + reservation name.
If the restaurant takes confirmation calls or texts, note that and watch for them.

required_user_info: Name to put the reservation under
Any dietary restrictions or accessibility needs
